signals.headline: Kevin Warsh's Senate Hearing Scheduled for April 21 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh's Senate Hearing Scheduled for April 21 | YES | HIGH confidence**

Kevin Warsh's confirmation hearing before the Senate Banking Committee has been officially scheduled for April 21 at 10 a.m. Eastern time[5]. Senate Banking Committee Chair Tim Scott predicted that the Senate will confirm Warsh "in the next several weeks" and stated the discussion will cover the economy, inflation, and

signals.headline: **US-Iran planning second round of direct talks in Pakistan (possibly within 2 days), after first round in Islamabad fai
signals.raw: **US-Iran planning second round of direct talks in Pakistan (possibly within 2 days), after first round in Islamabad failed; no deal reached, but written proposals exchanged on nuclear suspension (US wants 20 years, Iran offers 5).[1][3][5][6]**

signals.raw: **US naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz active, with Chinese/Iranian tankers crossing despite it; Iran avoiding direct escalation to keep talks alive.[3][4][5][6]**

signals.headline: **Confidence: MED (multiple sources confirm ongoing diplomacy and fragile truce, but no new breakthroughs or final dates
signals.raw: **Confidence: MED (multiple sources confirm ongoing diplomacy and fragile truce, but no new breakthroughs or final dates; Israeli strikes in Lebanon continue, adding volatility).[1][2][4]**
